He thought he didn't need love. It's not like the battlefield ever gave him the chance to anyways.

But when he saw how happy his older br0th3r was with his new f4m1ly, Rowan felt something he never thought he would—longing.

So he decided to give it a chance. One night, he logged onto an anonymous chatting site. And that's when he met you.

Everything was perfect! You were perfect. And for the first time in his live, he learned how to hope.

There's just one problem tho...

Still, the most forbidden fruit is always the sweetest, isn't it?
